dsp_disclaimer: DSP usage percentages are based on the Helix firmware 3.80 specification. Actual values may vary based on model complexity and effect parameters. Mono and stereo modes have different DSP loads.

blocks.name: 1x10 US Princess
blocks.description: This is the 1x10 US Princess effect block for the HX Stomp.

parameters.name: Distance
parameters.description: Controls the distance of the effect.

parameters.name: Low Cut
parameters.description: Controls the low cut of the effect.

parameters.name: High Cut
parameters.description: Controls the high cut of the effect.

parameters.name: Early Reflections
parameters.description: Controls the early reflections of the effect.

parameters.name: Level
parameters.description: Sets the overall output level of the block.
